$comment: Canonical cross-platform design tokens — the single source of truth for the palette, control geometry, radii and type scale shared by web (apps/web/src/styles.css), Android (Compose), iOS/macOS (SwiftUI) and Linux (GTK). The `palette` colors are authored as OKLCH to mirror the web theme verbatim; scripts/generate.ts converts them to sRGB hex for the native targets so the palette is never hand-transcribed. Run `bun run --filter @exp/design-tokens generate` after editing.

semantic.$comment: Fixed brand accent colors for status/priority/due-date/agent-plan. Not derived from the neutral surface palette; authored as sRGB hex and shared so iOS/Android/Linux stop each carrying their own copy.

radius.$comment: Web --radius is 0.625rem (10px); sm/md/lg/xl mirror Tailwind's calc()-derived steps.

size.$comment: Control geometry in px/dp. Web button heights h-9/h-8/h-6 = 36/32/24; input h-9 = 36; list rows h-8 = 32.
